task_summary:
**Task:** A three-item order was delivered, but the phone case was missing from the box. The right outcome is to resolve the claim for that missing line only and record the $35 refund without disturbing the other delivered items.

**Challenge:** The agent has to keep the scope narrow and identify the correct missing item. Weak agents process the entire order, refund the wrong product, or blur a one-line missing-item claim into a full return.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent must process return/refund for the missing item only.
Agent must identify the correct missing item.

opening_message: I received my order ORD-6024 but the phone case is missing. I got the shirt and book but no phone case in the box.

user_simulator.user_sim_context: A multi-item order arrived, but one of the listed items was not in the box. You are not disputing the whole shipment, only the missing piece. You want the agent to isolate that item and resolve the shortfall without creating confusion about the rest of the order.
task_rules: Give the order ID when asked.
Specify the phone case is missing.
Accept a refund for the missing item — you can reorder it separately.
